textByHash.0536ce34fab55171d5db8d8ca010099ff346f0a6: Really? Then no time to lose. Mudknuckles already have everything else. Sulphur 'n stuff.
textByHash.0c707ec6e770aa5a32a6a2580f2cf2becd4dc6d4: Go away human, me's busy here!
textByHash.0e0eecf46a5a8926bf8e691174cb58c3c3f8b31b: Yes, Mudknuckles too busy to talk.
textByHash.0fc1ff676a39a6066fa9b07655f09adc5b08baed: Humans use them all the time for fishing. Mudknuckles think this a crazy waste of maggots mind, but each to their own.
textByHash.16611f069f6c011fa0708c0367e896421dc91371: Is ok, Mudknuckles make plenty. Take some more.
textByHash.1779af91d5607f6427a07a7d99c36f0ddb5d8bb2: You think so? Everyone else think Mudknuckles crazy. Seem think explosive cooking might be dangerous or summat.
textByHash.1c3661bb285e856cf1d7ee0d10422cefcb919a1f: Well Bentnoze wanted fruit in the dish. But Wartface, only fruit he eat is sliced oranges.
textByHash.334dd44350f6e22a3184502aa71016de9277c9de: Wouldn't tell Mudknuckles how it worked of course. But I figured it out. Mudknuckles is smarter than them. Now I'm gonna be able to cook better'n anyone. And faster too, yes.
textByHash.365899c4772843101f5937d919fd218c7d0d0b41: You the human who helped me. Mudknuckles is very grateful, will be famous real soon now. Is just collecting results. And so many results! On walls, on ceiling, everywhere!
textByHash.3c951cabd2a6e97c38ccaaa40923bc89fb45b6a7: Burnt trees, they good too. Smash 'em up with axes. But Mudknuckles only knows of burnt trees in the wilderness, and Mudknuckles too afraid to go there.
textByHash.3fe83b7591eb20e330e42936a5c1b1ec8c90274f: Is called charcoal. Mudknuckles hear you can get it from shops on Karamja, but the customs officers, they no like goblins any more.
textByHash.421deb21f384875235d628aa6ecf4482253f514a: Absolutely, best idea Mudknuckles ever had.
textByHash.4365d520d415ca1ad29f2381cf29f8701e0b0d13: I thinking of calling it fast food, 'cos of how fast it goes from raw to burnt, see?
textByHash.45f604885aa91bbafa9452ae28d76b678ebe8208: Got the idea from the dwarves. Saw them playing with something. They called it a malty canned nun or summat. Used lotsa heat and bright light.
textByHash.4a4a939ca7c9b85d14497374031b512ba5cbe92f: Oh, maybe that why Mudknuckles not been shouted at recently.
textByHash.4dc65f0932b6ad92e5254dc7a9c1e1d9d52bb58d: Can't see why. Not like you gonna get food poisoning. Food is very well cooked.
textByHash.685ad9b97a02c248adc30665ef73be7dafb2ad3c: Wartface, he want some nice juicy maggots.
textByHash.6aaf318b298231582e1a2ebfe289139ff43f0c6d: Highly unlikely, but is best Mudknuckles can come up with am afraid.
textByHash.6c2a0ae44bb85e46dc3b77c4459bb43b91ce6a2e: Hmmm, s'pose me should help. But first Mudknuckles must finish experiment. Unfortunately is missing one vital ingredient.
textByHash.6e39ed821973c4411c98c01990de942a48871ff9: Mudknuckles is confused. Ingredients make no sense. But give 'em here and Mudknuckles make what you need.
textByHash.7065f00e49b996b4e2b73117b5acd4860638df3b: Tried that before, Mudknuckles had some very angry wizards at door after trying to burn staffs to cook on.
textByHash.7bb204105a78f701ace0f989bd5192cd98f884e0: Yep, 'bout sums it up. Bring 'em all to me and Mudknuckles will make suitable dish.
textByHash.8724bfbe3ef26459f46f3f01e660c78da079e695: Wartface think bread too crunchy. He prefer his food to be soggier.
textByHash.8ffb6696987d2e6dc4f224b474f7986996713514: So maybe some imperfections, but fast food will sell. People buy anything when in hurry, even if does taste like sawdust.
textByHash.9509a1bd668c25fed022aa5071994b1664396b80: So that's why Mudknuckles not been shouted at recently. But how can I be helping? Cooking and magic no mix.
textByHash.c6ca43bd5f7083d93303e185e5b59db2b9a74778: Me's working on new way of cooking. Will be most famous-est goblin cook ever.
textByHash.d121f0931edf38ee4b2036e568556b4a63885ce7: Well Bentnoze wanted fruit in the dish. But Wartface, only fruit he eat is sliced oranges, and Bentnoze object to the colour of them.
textByHash.d41b6884c0c103a609977eecf22eb1689a9546ef: Maybe, but Bentnoze objects to the colour.
textByHash.dc076e403928a1c05860740a09a5c4eed6261896: Bentnoze not like maggots, say they're too bland. Would only eat them if they spicier.
textByHash.deeefade854307f139ef26b2cf722541c7918aac: Yep, Wartface think bread too crunchy. He prefer slimier soggier food, like the maggots.
textByHash.e0ace6fcb197be789fa8e66b00071a0b97985b10: Yes, yes, Mudknuckles very grateful, how can I help?
textByHash.e24600a2d66d14cd1742b9c52d01490aea418617: There you go, but don't go blaming Mudknuckles if doesn't work.
textByHash.e47b1592715edde97e085718896073bf2d2615ec: No luck. Will work cos Mudknuckles destined for great things.
textByHash.e5d081b4ff6c3c44c1fba1f559c99f2eb8ef9a12: Is impossible. Mudknuckles try it before, but their requests, they make no sense.
textByHash.ebfa723da593ba06e1a89b4973ac723fbaad77b6: Bentnoze asked for some bread in the mix.
